_comment: Seed registry for the Peregrine plugin marketplace. Copy this file to the root of the Knaox/peregrine-plugins GitHub repo (branch main) so that Peregrine panels fetching https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Knaox/peregrine-plugins/main/registry.json can discover available plugins.

plugins.name: Server Invitations
plugins.description: Invite users to your servers by email with granular Pelican permissions. Edit permissions of active subusers and pending invitations. Ships with Peregrine by default.
plugins.author: Peregrine Team
